# setDefaultInputDevice(_:)

**Instance Method**

Set the defaultInputDevice property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setDefaultInputDevice(_ device: AudioHardwareDevice) throws
```

## Parameters

- **device**: An AudioHardwareDevice to use as the default input audio device
